title: Crash at strcpy_len ()
description: The following test case crashed the monetdb server.
poc: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0 CASCADE;

SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE (NOT (((- 9223372036854775807))>((CASE t0.c1 WHEN t0.c1 THEN -1 END )))) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE (NOT (NOT (((- 9223372036854775807))>((CASE t0.c1 WHEN t0.c1 THEN -1 END )))));
key_bug_features: Crash during string copy in SQL query execution
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 'test', TRUE);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2147483647, NULL, FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL AND (c3 OR c2 IS NULL);
